generated_oml:
// ==== C3: Physical sensing components ====
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedMotorShaftAngle
]

instance GearboxShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedGearboxShaftAngle
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedMotorCurrent
]

instance RobotControllerInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot controller providing measured output angle r_out and input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedOutputAngle
]

// ==== C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted) ====
instance DataTransmittedMotorShaftAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance DataTransmittedGearboxShaftAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxShaftEncoder
]

instance DataTransmittedMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RobotControllerInterface
]

// ==== C10: Data (raw traces) ====
instance MotorShaftAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle r_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedMotorShaftAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEngine
]

instance GearboxShaftAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox shaft angle r_G streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedGearboxShaftAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEngine
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedMotorCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of output angle r_out streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedOutputAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEngine
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque trace calculated from current and angle data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity trace (ω) computed from angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration trace (α) computed from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

// ==== C10: Models (engineering, simulation, analytical) ====
instance SysMLMotorGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the gearwheel component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical friction model combining Coulomb and viscous effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance FrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for low‑speed behaviour"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance FrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model capturing pre‑sliding dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance FrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for comprehensive friction representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

// ==== C11: Enablers (tools & platforms) ====
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modelling environment used for structural analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAnalysisService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution engine for running dynamic simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling one‑way automated data streaming from the robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard application for real‑time visualization of measured vs simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AAS providing standardized asset description and metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑based engine performing continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance VisualizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine (DashboardApp) delivering real‑time visualization of sensor data and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ControllerUpdateEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface to the robot controller used to upload updated friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterUpdateService
]

// ==== C6: Services ====
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction in the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionParametersDerived
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured versus simulated torque, velocity and angle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightVisualizationAvailable
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation and transmission of updated friction parameters to the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionUpdateControllerParameters
]

instance ModelAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing analysis of system models"
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling streaming of sensor data from the robot via MQTT"
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing asset metadata and lifecycle information"
]

// ==== C17: Insights / Actions ====
instance InsightFrictionParametersDerived : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) obtained from identification engine"
]

instance InsightVisualizationAvailable : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual comparison of measured sensor data with simulated model outputs"
]

instance ActionUpdateControllerParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of the robot controller with new friction parameters to improve motion‑control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous operation during robot runtime; data are captured and processed on‑line to enable immediate friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of a Purpose entity (FrictionDerivation), an Asset entity (Mabi robot), DataTrace and DataPoint entities for measured and simulated signals, Processing components that run simulation models, and links to sources; all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the operated stage of the physical system, providing run‑time monitoring and model updating during normal robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its source and processing model, continuous comparison of simulated friction‑free behaviour with measured data, and dynamic updating of both white‑box and black‑box friction models to maintain model accuracy over wear and operating conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way data transmission from PT to DT via MQTT protocol; data are annotated with metadata and linked to processing components within the digital shadow framework."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as an Industry 4.0 standard, SysML for engineering models, and the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) for consistent architecture."
]
